serviceNotes.engine oil: EU: Subaru Europe — 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first). Subaru of North America maintenance summaries cite 6,000 mi / 6 months for US-market cars; European BRZ owners should follow the EU interval unless a different interval is printed in their warranty booklet.
serviceNotes.interior ventilation filter: EU: replace cadence 30,000 km / 24 months between inspections (Subaru cabin-filter practice; consistent with Subaru-BRZ-FA24).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: 38,500 km / 24 months from Subaru of North America BRZ maintenance table (24,000 miles); EU cars may show the same or alternate km in the printed owner’s manual — this value is the North American BRZ specification converted to kilometres.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 96,500 km / 72 months: North American BRZ specification ~60,000 miles iridium service for FA20 (KBB BRZ spark schedule); not the generic 24,000-mile spark line in some multi-model Subaru pamphlets.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Subaru of North America: brake fluid replace every 24 months regardless of mileage; EU DOT4 practice aligns with 24-month time basis.
serviceNotes.inspect disc brake pads: EU: inspect on each 15,000 km / 12 month scheduled service (Subaru Europe service interval).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Subaru of North America BRZ: fuel filter replace at 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.rear differential oil: Subaru of North America BRZ: rear differential gear oil at 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.manual transmission oil: Subaru of North America BRZ: manual transmission gear oil at 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.coolant: 120,000 km / 96 months: Subaru Australia MY22+ BRZ/WRX handbook specifies coolant R at the H service for BRZ with Subaru Genuine Long Life coolant; ZC6 FA20 BRZ uses Subaru Genuine Long Life coolant — this interval is used for EU-aligned tracking from that published BRZ specification.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Subaru of North America lists ATF inspect (I) for BRZ at 48 months / 48,000 miles; preventive fluid exchange at the same km/month when fluid is dark or after severe use (REC).

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first). https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — North America reference: engine oil & filter every 6 months / 6,000 miles.
serviceSources.interior ventilation filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: cabin/pollen filter per owner’s manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — interior ventilation filter inspect/replace pattern for BRZ (30,000 km / 24 months cadence).
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: air cleaner per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — air cleaner element replace at 24 months / 24,000 miles (converted to ~38,500 km / 24 months).
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: spark plugs per manual. https://www.kbb.com/subaru/brz/2018/spark-plug-replacement/ — BRZ FA20 North American scheduled spark replacement ~60,000 miles (~96,500 km / 72 months).
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: brake fluid per authorised repairer. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — brake fluid replace every 24 months (footnote); scheduled table 24 months / 24,000 miles.
serviceSources.inspect disc brake pads: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: 15,000 km / 12 month service visits include brake checks per manual.
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: fuel filter per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ fuel filter replace 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceSources.rear differential oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: differential per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ rear differential gear oil 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: gearbox oil per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ transmission gear oil 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceSources.coolant: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: coolant service per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — BRZ coolant R at 120,000 km / 96 months (H service), Subaru Genuine Longlife coolant; applied to FA20 BRZ for same coolant specification.
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: ATF per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ ATF inspect 48 months / 48,000 miles; preventive exchange at same km when fluid condition warrants (REC).
